entity.summary: Cross-chain DEX and bridge protocol originally known as Anyswap. Multichain's official rebrand announcement states that Anyswap was founded in July 2020, was originally positioned as a cross-chain DEX, removed the DEX function in early 2021, and officially rebranded as Multichain on 2021-12-16. CoinDesk and later Multichain materials also describe Multichain as formerly Anyswap. HEI treats the Anyswap identity as rebranded rather than simply dead.
entity.notes: Retain rebranded / rebrand. Multichain's official materials say Anyswap was born on July 20, 2020 and formally became Multichain on December 16, 2021. The original anyswap.exchange domain was described in 2021 as continuing without further updates, but its present state could not be verified safely, so official_url_status is unknown rather than live_unverified. successor_id remains null because Multichain is not yet a canonical HEI entity.

expected.notes: HEI uses status rebranded and death_reason rebrand because Multichain's official announcement says Anyswap shall be known as Multichain from 2021-12-16. successor_id remains null because Multichain is not yet a canonical HEI entity. country_or_origin follows the Singapore dateline in official Multichain PR materials and should be treated as source-context based.

changes.notes: Retain rebranded / rebrand. Multichain's official materials say Anyswap was born on July 20, 2020 and formally became Multichain on December 16, 2021. The original anyswap.exchange domain was described in 2021 as continuing without further updates, but its present state could not be verified safely, so official_url_status is unknown rather than live_unverified. successor_id remains null because Multichain is not yet a canonical HEI entity.

events.title: Anyswap launched as a cross-chain DEX
events.description: Multichain's official documentation records that the protocol was born as Anyswap on July 20, 2020 to provide cross-chain exchange and interoperability services.
events.notes: Exact launch date is taken from Multichain's first-party historical documentation.

evidence.title: Multichain Introduction
evidence.notes: First-party historical documentation states that Multichain was born as Anyswap on July 20, 2020.

evidence.title: Anyswap to officially rebrand as Multichain
evidence.notes: First-party rebrand announcement states that Anyswap would be known as Multichain from December 16, 2021 and that the DEX function had been removed earlier in 2021.

evidence.title: Multichain FAQ
evidence.notes: Official FAQ describes Anyswap's transformation from a cross-chain DEX into Multichain's cross-chain infrastructure identity.
